svg.title: HyperWeave Badge Showcase — Mixed DNA Triple Flow
svg.desc: Three rows of badges from arcade, De Stijl, proofset, and matrix DNA systems scrolling in alternating directions

rdf:Description.dc:title: HyperWeave Badge Showcase — Mixed DNA Triple Flow
rdf:Description.dc:creator: HyperWeave Compositor v0.1 (InnerAura Labs)

hw:reasoning.hw:intent: Showcase the full breadth of HyperWeave badge DNA systems in a single animated marquee
hw:reasoning.hw:approach: Mix arcade, De Stijl scholarly, matrix DNA, and proofset badges across three counter-scrolling rows with chrome-horizon frame
hw:reasoning.hw:tradeoffs: Mixed badge sizes (140-158px) standardized to 166px pitch; arcade bevels preserved; De Stijl structure faithful to specimens
